title: eryngium ebracteatum
intro: Eryngium ebracteatum, also known as sea urchin flower or button sea holly, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Eryngium ebracteatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Eryngium ebracteatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
